rag_rules: Repair validator diagnostics by moving invalid implementation bindings to the implementation annex
Do not place guarantees in implementation scope; use assign only for valid output features or auxiliary variables
Use only visible AADL features or eq helpers declared in the same annex for guarantees
Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes
generic_rules: Repair validator diagnostics without changing unrelated architecture
Use only valid identifiers visible in the current scope
Place implementation-level bindings in implementation annexes
Use AGREE scalar types int, real, and bool for const and eq declarations
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are written inside annex agree {** ... **}; blocks
Use assign for implementation-level bindings to valid output features or auxiliary variables
Use guarantees for type-level contracts over visible ports
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantees in implementation scope
Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes
Do not use unresolved identifiers or invalid helper declarations in guarantees
